final:
module RefModule(
	input wire clk,reset, we4,bt,
	input wire [31:0]d,
	output reg [31:0]q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always@(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin 
		if(reset) begin
			q<=32'd0;
		end else begin 
			if(we4) begin
				q<=d;				
			end 
		end
	end
endmodule
